events.name: 周回前の〆にあった奴の保険

parameters: [52,53,54,55].every(function(id){return $gameSwitches.value(id) > 0});
By seeing all endings, a bonus Sex event has been unlocked. You can
view it in the recollection room, so please make sure to check it out.
ShowInfo Unlocking_erotic_events._Let's_go_to_the_flashback_room.
